name: jwt-auth-best-practices
description: Auditing tools built from the JWT, refresh token, RBA, and OIDC best-practices guide: standards-mapped authentication code review for Node.js and beyond.

plugins.name: jwt-auth-auditor
plugins.description: Audit a codebase's JWT, refresh token, session cookie, risk-based authentication, and OIDC implementation against RFC 8725, RFC 9700, OWASP cheat sheets, and NIST SP 800-63B-4. Produces a tiered scorecard with evidence-backed findings and concrete fixes.
